name: Big Sale
tip: The sea merchants over there are selling some useful shop items at a great bargain. Go and have a look there?

name: Seek Treasure Chest
tip: Mystical relics encountered! Go explore it and you may get unexpected treasures! Set off now!

name: Underwater Treasure
tip: Seems like the mystery treasure chests contain fantastic treasures. Open it now!

name: Treasure Pointer
tip: Captain, the treasure pointer moved! As long as we can find the place in the map, we may get rich!

name: Teleport
tip: Captain, we've entered a mystery teleport array! Where will we be teleported to this time?

name: Divine
tip: We run into a mystical stargazer. If we are lucky, we can get extra action times, but if not… Captain, shall we have a try?

name: Feast
tip: Crews caught tons of seafoods and had a feast. Now the HP is restored by 30%!

name: Sea God's Magic
tip: Captain! We're enchanted by Sea God. What will be ahead of us?

name: EXP Bonus
tip: Captain, we are now in the foggy zone. Perhaps we can get double EXP!

name: Tsunami
tip: The warship is severely damaged by the tsunami. HP is reduced by 30%!

name: Pirates' Trap
tip: Captain! We fell into pirates' trap. We shall beat them first!

name: Marine Attack
tip: Captain, we're attacked by the marine headquarter fleet. It's said that they are very powerful. Better escape now!

name: Marine Patrol
tip: Captain, we've met the patrolling marines. Seems like they are coming for no good. We've prepared for the battle!

name: Detection
tip: Captain, it's a nice day! We can see everything around us very clearly!

name: Treasure Map
tip: Captain! We find a treasure map! Now we can go to dig the treasure at sea!
